creator: me@svmhdvn.name
text: Can we just add "-Wl,--undefined" to the linker flags for any LLVM 16+ in the meantime? My upstream pull request may be a little incomplete, but it should be on the right track. While that is getting reviewed by upstream maintainers, building just the heimdal-devel port with -Wl,--undefined" should be fine right?
